eligible_applicant_type: Local government entities (cities, towns, villages, counties)
geographic_restrictions: Projects must be located within the Niagara Greenway region in Western New York (Buffalo-Niagara region).
project_area: Ecological enhancements including land acquisition and conservation, habitat research, aquatic and terrestrial land restoration, ecological stewardship activities, and education.
demographic_requirements: Projects must align with the Niagara River Greenway Plan and receive a determination of 'consistency' from the Niagara River Greenway Commission prior to submission.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include non-profits (501(c)(3)), local government entities, Indian Nations, or public benefit corporations in the Buffalo-Niagara region. Projects must support ecological enhancements within the Niagara Greenway and align with the Niagara River Greenway Plan.
